allow: Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr --session navtest workspace list)
Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr --session navtest server reload-config)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(w['workspace_id'], 'focused' if w['focused'] else ''\) for w in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']['workspaces']]")
Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr --session navtest pane list)
Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr --session navtest workspace focus w2)
Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr --session navtest agent list)
Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr --session navtest workspace focus w1)
Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr --session navtest workspace focus w3)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; [print\(a['pane_id'], a['agent'], a['agent_status']\) for a in json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']['agents']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('status:', d['result']['status'], 'diagnostics:', d['result']['diagnostics']\)")
Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr --session navtest server stop)
Bash(env XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/hnav herdr session delete navtest)
